DOWNLOAD DAVE'S APP AND GET A FREE REWARD!

Taste Sensational Juicy Tenders at Mission Valley's Spicy Spot

Discover the unique delight of Dave's Hot Chicken Tenders in Mission Valley, San Diego. These larger-than-usual tenders, hand-breaded and cooked to perfection, offer a tantalizing crunch. From "No Spice" to fiery "Reaper," choose from seven distinctive heat levels. Our Halal-certified chicken is loved by hot chicken fans for its flavor. Order individually or in combo meals for the perfect feast! For smaller portions, try Dave's Bites. Experience Nashville Style Chicken at its best today!
ORDER NOW

Juicy, Spicy Sliders on Soft Potato Buns in Mission Valley!

Join the throng of locals at our San Diego - Mission Valley location, on Camino De La Reina, raving over Dave's Hot Chicken Sliders! These are no ordinary hot chicken sandwiches; we heap juicy, Halal-certified Nashville Style Chicken onto soft potato buns. Add crisp pickles, fresh kale slaw, and a smothering of Dave’s signature sauce for an unparalleled flavor experience. The taste and quality will leave you craving more.
ORDER NOW

Seven Levels of Heat to Blow Your Mind

From “No Spice” to “Reaper,” Dave's is serving up seven levels of heat to blow your mind. Fried and spiced fresh to order, we take pride in serving up the freshest food made with premium ingredients - like our halal certified, full-sized chicken tenders.
ORDER NOW

Dave's Hot Chicken Menu & Prices

We know you have a lot of options when it comes to hot chicken, or even fried chicken fast food spots near you. That’s why we work hard to keep our quality and service at the highest levels and to charge a fair price for our “blow your mind” food.

DISCOVER SPICY SLIDERS IN SAN DIEGO, CA

Nearby at 2075 Camino De La Reina, our restaurant serves up crave-worthy hot chicken every day of the week. Whether you're grabbing a quick lunch or fueling a late-night craving, Dave's Hot Chicken in SAN DIEGO, CA delivers heat and flavor in every bite.
